Brahms: The Boy II (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $12,611,536Details
International Box Office $6,356,790
Worldwide Box Office $18,968,326
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $44,256
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $46,238
Total $90,494
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A young family, unaware of the terrifying history of the estate into which they move, where their young son soon makes an unsettling new friend, an eerily life-like doll he calls Brahms.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,823,006 (46.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.17 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:66.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,151 opening theaters/2,151 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $16,430,720

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 21st, 2020 (Wide) by STX Entertainment
International Releases: February 20th, 2020 (Wide) (New Zealand)
February 20th, 2020 (Wide) (Germany)
February 21st, 2020 (Wide), released as Brahms: The Boy Ii (Australia)
February 21st, 2020 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
February 28th, 2020 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: April 3rd, 2020 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for terror, violence, disturbing images and thematic elements. NOTE: EDITED FOR RE-RATE. CONTENT IS DIFFERENT FROM PG-13 RATED VERSION, BULLETIN NO. 2594 (9/4/19). ONLY THIS EDITED VERSION IS RATED. CHANGE IN RATING DESCRIPTOR ONLY.
(Rating bulletin 2613 (Cert #52367), 1/22/2020)
Running Time: 86 minutes
Franchise: The Boy
Cast, crew, or production detail: Sequels Without Their Original Stars
Geographical setting: United Kingdom
Plot point: Country Mouse, City Mouse, Living Toys
Subgenre: Isolation Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lakeshore Entertainment, STX Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
